purpose: Track explicit temporary waivers for risky D3D12 capability claims that are only partially proven by the current SDK probe suite.

waivers.justification: Phase 4 proves the reported WaveOps fields and Phase 14.14 proves an SM6 DXIL path exists, but no probe yet executes a real wave-intrinsic shader and validates the result.
waivers.expires_when: A wave-intrinsic shader probe executes successfully and validates output.
